_doc: Four DCO2G supply / terminal nets from the user's DCOBUF CSV. Each gets an Iavg over the t_1..t_2 window. Kept in v1 (string-only) form on purpose — it's the regression pin for the basename-collision case (/VDD x2, /PLUS x2 collapse to Iavg_VDD / Iavg_PLUS). The v2 alias-map form (DECISIONS #49) solves this idiom — bump schema_version to 2 and replace each entry with {"net": ..., "alias": ...} to get distinct output names.
name: dco2g_supplies
